response.justification: Sarah has extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains, with strong evidence of architectural thinking, open-source contributions, and AI-agent work — all aligned with the role. However, her resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, React (only Ember.js), and Kubernetes in production contexts, and her primary stack appears heavily weighted toward DLang and Node.js rather than the required TypeScript/React/Nest.js combo, creating uncertainty about immediate fit.
strengths: Proven full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud tools like AWS CDK
Demonstrated AI-agent infrastructure experience and open-source leadership
Strong testing culture with TDD, Vitest-like tools (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), and CI/CD expertise
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or React in work history; primary frontend experience is Ember.js
Vitest not directly referenced; testing frameworks shown are D-language specific
German language skill is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
